skill_invocation: invokeMarketingSkill("emails", { subjectLine, customerContext, brandVoice, intent: "alternate phrasing", originalBody }, { variants: 2 })
brand_voice: Operator. Jack writes the email, not 'we'. No 'thank you for choosing us' — the deposit already cleared. Plain, concrete, no exclamation points. Signed '— Jack / Day14'.

customerContext.scenario: Sent 60s after deposit-received, or as a nudge if the intake is still empty 24h in. The customer needs to complete an 8-minute form before the build clock can resume.
customerContext.topic: One-page intake form. 8 minutes. The 14-day clock pauses until it's in.

originalBody:
Here's the intake: {{intake_url}}

One page. Logo, services, pricing, photos, service area. That's the whole input.

If you have brand assets already, drag them into the upload field. If you don't, I'll work from what's on your current site or your Instagram — say which.

Aim for tonight. The 14-day clock pauses until I have it, per the SOW.

— Jack
Day14

variants.rationale: placeholder #1 — strategy: tight-receipt (one-line acknowledgement, numbered next steps)
placeholder #2 — strategy: warmer-ops (single sentence of context before the next step)

reason: marketing-skills plugin not found on disk
